bookmarks.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this bookmark?

sync.title: Syncing
sync.description: Sync your bookmarks across devices using an ID, encryption key, and shared secret. Your data is encrypted locally before being uploaded.
sync.generate_confirm: Generating new credentials will replace your current ones. If you have synced data on the server, you will lose access to it unless you have backed up the old credentials. Continue?

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.fetch_favicons_description: When enabled, the app will request site icons from favicon.im. This may reveal the domains you have bookmarked to that service.

data.title: Data Management
data.purge_tooltip: Permanently remove bookmarks marked as deleted
data.purge_confirm: Permanently remove all bookmarks marked as deleted? Only do this if you are sure all your devices have synced the deletions.
data.clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete ALL bookmarks and settings? This cannot be undone.
data.import_no_changes: No new changes found in the backup file.
data.import_error: Failed to parse the backup file.

about.title: About Bookmarks
about.description: A simple, private, and encrypted bookmark manager. This app is designed to be lightweight, offline-first, and secure.

features.title: Features
items: **End-to-End Encryption**: Your data is encrypted in your browser using your sync credentials. Nobody else can read your bookmarks.
**Offline Access**: Works without an internet connection as a Progressive Web App (PWA).
**Fast & Minimal**: No bloat, no tracking, just your bookmarks.

usage.title: Usage Tips
items: **Tags**: Use tags to categorize your bookmarks. You can filter by tags in the main view or the dedicated Tags tab.
**Sync**: Set up a sync URL and credentials in Settings to keep your bookmarks backed up and synced across devices.
**PWA**: Install this app on your home screen or desktop for a native-like experience.

privacy.title: Privacy and GDPR
privacy.content:
This app is built with privacy in mind. All data is stored locally in your browser and encrypted with your sync credentials on the server. We do not collect any personal data or analytics.

If you don't enable sync, no data will ever leave your device. Even with sync enabled, your data is encrypted before it leaves your browser, so we have no access to it.
privacy.contact: If you have any GDPR-related questions or requests, please contact us at {email}

opensource.title: Open Source
opensource.content: This project is open-source and respects your privacy. You can find the source code and contribute on GitHub.
